title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones is part of the role.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, expertise in scaling revenue operations, and Salesforce mastery directly align with Finout's needs. The Tel Aviv/New York hybrid structure matches his location preferences perfectly, and the fintech/cloud management domain fits his strong background.

With 15+ years building RevOps functions in high-growth B2B SaaS—including scaling GTM engines beyond $30M+ ARR with deep Salesforce and revenue analytics expertise—I'm excited about the opportunity to build your operational backbone while collaborating across your Tel Aviv and New York teams.

title: Lead GTM Engineer (Remote)

I've led similar founding-stage function builds, though I'm curious whether you need someone who codes Python daily or someone who can architect the GTM tech stack, hire the engineers, and own the outcomes—happy to explore either direction.
